activityIntent.carePlanHypothesis: Use chart evidence to choose a spelling instrument and update the next plan.
activityIntent.diagnosticQuestion: Can the child recognize or recall due words under timed pressure?
successCriteria: fast accurate responses in hidden or captured recall mode
reviseCriteria: visual mode succeeds but hidden recall drops
falsifyCriteria: timer creates frustration before useful evidence
